user.title: BFT Cloud Account
user.description: Enter your BFT uControl cloud credentials.

data_description.username: The email address used for your BFT uControl account.
data_description.password: The password for your BFT uControl account.
data_description.timeout: Timeout in seconds for each API request (default: 10).
data_description.retry_count: Number of retries for failed API requests (default: 3).

device.title: Select Device
device.description: Select the BFT gate device to add.

data_description.name: Custom name for this gate in Home Assistant. Defaults to the device name.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate BFT
reauth_confirm.description: Your BFT credentials are no longer valid. Please enter updated credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to BFT cloud service.
error.no_devices: No BFT devices found in your account.
